raw_text: alberto alonso martínez c/ escosura, 19 28015 madrid, spain telephone: +34 699 806510 alberto.alonso88@gmail.com monday 15th of june 2015 dear director, i am writing to enquire about the master in aircraft systems integration at u3cm. my academic preparation, and career interests fit your studies very well, and i enclose my cv for your consideration. i have completed my degree in aeronautical engineering with a specialization in aircrafts and a final degree project entitled analysis of the required thrust of an aircraft aided during take-off and landing by ground-based system using magnetic levitation technology. since september i have been working for airbus as an intern and also a msc in professional development. during this internship my team has studied improvements in the serial production aircrafts a320, a330 and a330-250xl (new beluga) and has been developing new technologies. this experience has taught me the value of communication between team members and how to work well in a team under the pressure of deadlines. in addition, my experience as a youth worker has presented me with a range of responsibilities and develops my ability to contribute effectively. i hope that, on consideration of my cv and my enthusiasm and interest about the experience of working for airbus, you will be persuaded of my potential. i am happy to provide any further information in support of my application and i am available for interview at any time. i look forward to hearing from you in the near future. yours faithfully, alberto alonso martinez alberto alonso martínez calle escosura, 19, 1g, 28015, madrid, spain alberto.alonso88@gmail.com +34 699 806 510 spanish 6th april 1988 experience airbus operations s.l. getafe, spain rfe architecture and integration
